concepts.name: Batch
concepts.description: The bundle is a transaction - intended to be processed by a server as a group of actions.

concepts.name: Batch Response
concepts.description: The bundle is a batch response. Note that as a batch, some responses may indicate failure and others success.

concepts.name: Collection
concepts.description: The bundle is a set of resources collected into a single document for ease of distribution.

concepts.name: Document
concepts.description: The bundle is a document. The first resource is a Composition.

concepts.name: History List
concepts.description: The bundle is a list of resources from a history interaction on a server.

concepts.name: Message
concepts.description: The bundle is a message. The first resource is a MessageHeader.

concepts.name: Search Results
concepts.description: The bundle is a list of resources returned as a result of a search/query interaction, operation, or message.

concepts.name: Transaction
concepts.description: The bundle is a transaction - intended to be processed by a server as an atomic commit.

concepts.name: Transaction Response
concepts.description: The bundle is a transaction response. Because the response is a transaction response, the transactionhas succeeded, and all responses are error free.
